prose.overview: Star Country Club — also known as Aquarius Country Club — is a long-established 18-hole golf course in Bang Sai, Ayutthaya Province, approximately 70 minutes north of Bangkok. Opened in 1992 and designed by Thai architect Cherd Boonyarattanavej, the course occupies an attractive setting surrounded by lakes and greenery. It is notable for offering some of the lowest green fees of any 18-hole course within the extended Bangkok catchment area, making it a popular choice for local Thai golfers, nearby residents, and budget-conscious visitors who want a full round without the premium prices of the capital's more prominent venues. The dual name (Star/Aquarius) reflects past and current branding used interchangeably across booking platforms.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole par-72 layout measures 6,472 yards from the blue tees — a moderate length that places a premium on accuracy rather than power. Designed by Cherd Boonyarattanavej in the classic Thai parkland style, the course features narrow fairways lined by mature trees, well-guarded greens with strategic bunkering, and lakes that come into play on a number of holes. The combination of tight corridors and punishing water hazards means that course management is key; attempting to overpower the layout typically results in dropped shots. Greens are moderately sized and hold approach shots reasonably well. The overall difficulty level suits mid-handicappers who enjoy a test of accuracy, and the course can be genuinely challenging when the wind picks up across the more exposed holes. The pro shop and driving range are available for warm-up. Pace of play is generally good on weekdays.
prose.tips: Star Country Club offers remarkable value for money — one of the cheapest 18-hole options within reach of Bangkok. Weekday rounds are significantly quieter and faster. The course's narrow fairways mean accuracy off the tee is more important than distance; bring a reliable mid-iron for the approach shots. Caddie service is available and recommended given the tight, tree-lined corridors. The address is on Bangbuathong-Suphanburi Road in Bang Sai — allow 70 minutes from Bangkok and use GPS as the area is rural.
prose.location_and_access: Star Country Club is located at 17 Moo 8, Bangbuathong-Suphanburi Road, Bang Sai, Ayutthaya Province, approximately 65 km from central Bangkok. The drive takes around 70 minutes via Route 340 (Bangbuathong-Suphanburi Road) heading north. The rural setting means a private car or pre-booked Grab taxi is essential — public transport does not serve this area directly.
prose.rental_cta_context: Taking advantage of Star Country Club's exceptional value green fees? LENGOLF delivers quality rental clubs to your Bangkok hotel so the savings really add up on your golf day out.
